Privacy and SecurityAt VogaCloset we respect your privacy and preferences for the use of your information are our highest priority. We take great care to safeguard information in our possession.We never share customer information (including e-mail addresses) unless it is absolutely necessary to provide you with products or services we offer. We may also disclose information when you tell us to do so, to identify or contact you, to protect your rights or the rights of VogaCloset or as required by law.
